content.rendered:
COMMERCIAL ROOFING IN CALGARY

  • Contact Us
  • This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

Commercial Roofing Company Delivering On Time & On Budget

Selecting the right commercial roofing company in Calgary can be a vigorous process. Whatever your situation, City Roofing & Exteriors can identify the problems surrounding your roof and fix them as quickly as possible. While we might work fast, we don’t cut corners in our profession. We’re focused on delivering quality service and value, guaranteeing that your roof returns to its optimum condition, saving you thousands of dollars over the next several decades. 

 

As Calgary’s leading commercial roofing contractors, we’re trained to meet the specific and unique needs of our commercial clients. We have a large portfolio of successful roofs that we’ve managed over the years (including slate, asphalt, flat and sloped), delivering results that are worth their weight in gold. We’ve worked on industrial locations and warehouses, retail stores, office and commercial buildings, and even new developments. 

 

Our level of experience, knowledge of commercial roofing and desire to find affordable solutions for our clients within a timeframe that works for you is why we’re the go-to roofing company that people trust. 

 

If your roof is poorly maintained, it can lead to substantial repair and replacement costs, resulting in loss of business, damaged goods and unhappy tenants. We understand that roofing projects can be extremely expensive, so our roofers are committed to keeping our prices as affordable as possible. Whether you need some basic roofing services, maintenance or a roof replacement, contact us today for a free quote.

Commercial Flat Roofing

Sloped Commercial Roofing

Commercial Roof Repair & Maintenance

GET A QUOTE

RESIDENTIAL ROOFING

DON’T LET YOUR HOME BE AT RISK. KEEP YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES SAFE WITH OUR TRUSTED RESIDENTIAL ROOFING SPECIALISTS.

COMMERCIAL ROOFING

OUR COMMERCIAL ROOFING SERVICES ARE OFFERED ALL YEAR. WE MAKE SURE ALL SAFETY AND BUILDING CODES ARE STRICTLY FOLLOWED.

FLAT
ROOFING

Prevent leaks, or worse, a collapsed roof with our consistent and reliable flat roofing services.

ROOF REPLACEMENT

WHEN IT COMES TO YOUR ROOF REPLACEMENT, WE REPAIR UNTIL WE NEED TO REPLACE. THAT IS OUR WORKMANSHIP GUARANTEED .

EXTERIORS

EXTERIORS ARE BUILT FOR YOUR PROTECTION. OUR EXTERIORS GO BEYOND THAT BY OFFERING QUALITY AESTHETIC CRAFTSMANSHIP 

Exceptional Commercial Roofing Solutions In Calgary

City Roofing & Exteriors is a leading provider of commercial roofing in Calgary. And unlike other commercial roofing companies in Calgary, we adhere to strict code of ethics: our team is the only team that does the work, we deliver services without disrupting your business, we focus on health and safety, and offer a lifetime guarantee. 

Safety is a prime concern in business and industrial settings, so we take it very seriously. Our commercial roofing contractors take all the necessary precautions to ensure that they handle your roof repairs without risking their lives – and yours! We have processes that follow the highest safety standards, with an eye for continuous improvement so we can meet any new challenges. 

We understand that repairs aren’t always convenient. That is why we work with you to ensure that your commercial roofing installation, replacement or repair doesn’t interfere with the flow of business. We focus on delivering on your requested roofing services and repairs without disturbing your operations, ensuring that you can continue operating at full capacity.

We can guarantee this level of service and quality due to the fact that we only use our in-house staff. We never use subcontractors, as that impacts the quality of our work, scheduling and outcome. By using only our team, we can ensure that we maintain control of the services and live up to our good name and the standard that we’ve set. 

While we work quickly to complete the project in as little time as possible, we’re also committed to exceptional quality, backed by a lifetime guarantee. We work efficiently and pay attention to the small details that can differentiate between a professional job and a sloppy job. You will get nothing but professional, skilled work from our experienced team. And it’s for this reason that we’re the most exceptional commercial roofing company in Calgary.

GET A QUOTE

Why choose to work with Calgary’s top rated roofing company

We are 100% in-house staff; we do not use ANY subcontractors.

This allows us to maintain complete control of scheduling, workmanship and clean up after your roof repairs or replacement is completed.

We don’t rent bins; we have our own dump trailers.

This not only allows us to maintain control of scheduling, but it ensures you won’t have a bin blocking your driveway for a week. We remove our dump trailer daily.

We have an office and warehouse.

90% of the Calgary roofers work out of their home! Are they real Calgary roofing companies? Or just salesmen who subcontract?

Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

We provide all of our roof replacements with a Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

CALL US TODAY

PROCESS WITH CITY ROOFING & EXTERIORS

QUOTE

We provide competitive quotes so you know you are getting the best price in the industry, without having to compromise quality workmanship for your exteriors.

PLAN

Our extensive planning allows for a swift and smooth operation, on schedule and without any hassle. Our details make the difference in your quality. 

INSTALL

We begin our installation by ensuring all objects are out of the way or covered. We begin our work promptly on schedule and complete our installation on-time.

CLEAN

Cleaning is done right after any work is complete. The drop-sheets and coverings protect your area and allow for quick and spotless clean. We leave nothing behind.

INSPECT

Quality guarantee is what we pride ourselves on. A full inspection is administered by a site manager and client approval is what completes the project.

Inspect the Interior

Using a thermal camera and moisture meter, our commercial roof inspector will carefully examine the building’s interior. This allows us to determine if there has been a leak and to pinpoint the location and severity.

Inspect the Building Envelope.

Our commercial roof inspector will determine if there are other issues with the building besides the commercial roof, such as eavestroughs, downpipes, scuppers, windows, flashing/cladding, masonry and the structural integrity of the building.

Commercial Roof Inspection.

Our commercial roof inspector will do a photo report and report critical issues such as sloping, drainage, pooling, flashing, rooftop unit, ventilation, and mechanical. After evaluating these key points, we will be able to determine the estimated remaining lifespan of your commercial roof.

Commercial Roof Inspection Report.

Our commercial roof inspector will create a detailed report using the photos and findings. We will determine the best course of action to take for your commercial roof and create a corresponding proposal. This will detail for each concerning area the severity of the issue and what the recommended course of action should be.

Get A Commercial Roof Inspection With Us

At City Roofing & Exteriors, we know there is a hesitation that comes with checking on your roof. We know that you might be concerned about the expensive costs for repairs, or if a minor problem can develop into a big one, therefore impacting your business. We’re here to assure you that undergoing inspections and maintenance checks for your commercial roof is the right move you can make. 

 

Having a commercial roof inspection on your property can prevent potential costly issues in the future. Letting leaks get larger, holes developing or gutters failing to operate properly can put your roof under more pressure, impacting its quality, your commercial building’s value and your health and safety. Acting fast with repairs and replacement can reduce any costly repairs that might arise over time. Thankfully, you have our commercial roofing contractors ready to help you at a moment’s notice. 

 

Our experienced Calgary Roofing company’s commercial roofing contractors use the latest technology and in-depth analysis to analyze your commercial roof, taking into account everything inside and outside. With this level of depth and information, we can pinpoint any potential problems and offer affordable solutions on how we can repair them. This is due to our four-point process that provides you with direct answers on your roof’s current sustainability. Here are the four phases of our commercial roofing inspection:

Check Out Our Blog

TESTIMONIALS

Highly recommend this company to anyone looking to get their roof replaced. Incredible prices and workmanship. Entire job was done in only about 8 hours. Cody was a pleasure to be in communication with, he is knowledgeable and extremely friendly. He even made time for me to come by his office and choose a shingle colour in person because I could not decide on one from the pictures. I am extremely pleased with the service I received.
Sarim T.
A friend recommended City Roofing to fix some bad leaks on my flat roof. Ken and Codi came out to have a look and later that day Ken explained to me where the problem areas are (texted me pictures as well) and the cost to fix. Ken was in constant contact, replying to my texts after hours and on weekends. What great service!! (And very reasonable price) We had lots of rain since then, no leaks! Highly recommend these guys!!
Chris L.
Highly Recommended. We had had a minor roof problem since we moved into our house 10 years ago. Our builder said it was not a roof problem and told us instead how we could maintain our house better. Fast forward 10 years later, even though we had followed the builder's instructions, the problem had deteriorated, and there were water leaks and molds. Upon a friend's recommendation, we contacted City Roofing for help.
Cody came to our home, analyzed the problem and answer all the questions I had. He and another roofer came again later in the week with all the parts and tools and fixed our roof. They did other repairs for us that were outside of scope. We are very grateful for their help. Highly recommended.
Read More
Albert L.

FAQs

How do I know if my business needs a new commercial roof?

If there is unexplained mold, water stains, condensation or in extreme cases, a leak. We can help determine if your business needs a new commercial roof.

How long does it take to install a new commercial roof?

The size of the job, type of roofing, any existing damage and the weather can all effect how long your commercial roofing installation will take. Our experts will provide you with a timeline after our free consultation.

How do I choose the right commercial roofing contractor?

Choosing the right commercial roofing contractor to trust can be daunting. Ask your contractor what kind of training they do with their crews and what certifications they hold with suppliers and industry organizations.

How long should my roof last?

A commercial roof should last 20 – 50 years. This is dependent on the type of product installed along with the correct ventilation.

How do I know which type of commercial roofing is best for my building?

It all depends on the structure of your building, the slope of your roof and the building’s support system. Some roofing is best for particular types of buildings (such as flat roofs for warehouses), while others can have sloped roofs to aid you). Of course, the appearance and fitting in with the neighbourhood are aesthetic considerations that you must consider. Our team can give you more information when they inspect your roof. 

Our roof was damaged in a storm. Will you help us with our insurance claim so we can get the work approved?

Yes, we will! We’re experts when it comes to working with insurance companies for both residential and commercial roofing claims. We’ll make sure that you get your roof covered by the insurance company, so you don’t pay too much out of pocket! We can inspect the damage with a proven background of trust and credibility, before assisting with the paperwork.

Do you also work on siding and exteriors for commercial properties?

Yes we do! We’re so skilled that we can offer affordable solutions to all types of siding and exterior projects and problems. We can help with fascia, soffit, eavestrough systems, cladding and siding. Speak to our team today more for information.
